message:
refactor(api,connector,control): update REST API, connector subsystem, and control plane

API Layer (8 files):
- session_auth.rs: Session authentication hardening with token rotation
- fleet_control_routes.rs, fleet_quarantine.rs: Fleet management and quarantine
  endpoint refinements
- middleware.rs: Request pipeline updates for new auth flow
- compat_gate.rs: API compatibility gate adjustments
- error.rs, service.rs, mod.rs: Error handling and service wiring updates

Connector Subsystem (30+ files):
- cancel_injection_gate.rs, cancellation_protocol.rs: Cancellation flow hardening
- canonical_serializer.rs: Deterministic serialization refinements
- capability_artifact.rs, capability_guard.rs: Capability model updates
- ecosystem_compliance.rs (+375), ecosystem_registry.rs: Compliance framework expansion
- control_evidence.rs, control_evidence_replay.rs: Evidence chain updates
- diagnostic_registry.rs, dpor_schedule_gate.rs: Diagnostic and scheduling gates
- durability.rs, high_assurance_promotion.rs: Durability and promotion logic
- incident_bundle_retention.rs, migration_artifact.rs, migration_pipeline.rs:
  Incident and migration pipeline updates
- n_version_oracle.rs, obligation_tracker.rs, operator_intelligence.rs:
  Oracle, obligation, and operator subsystems
- perf_budget_guard.rs, policy_checkpoint.rs, region_ownership.rs:
  Performance budgets, policy checkpoints, region management
- rollback_bundle.rs, saga.rs, supervision.rs: Transaction and supervision updates
- tiered_trust_storage.rs, transport_fault_gate.rs: Trust storage and fault handling
- trust_object_id.rs, trust_zone.rs: Trust object management
- universal_verifier_sdk.rs, verifier_sdk.rs: Verifier SDK updates
- vef_claim_integration.rs, vef_execution_receipt.rs, vef_perf_budget.rs: VEF connectors
- mod.rs: Updated connector module exports

Control Plane (10 files):
- audience_token.rs, cancellation_injection.rs, cancellation_protocol.rs:
  Token and cancellation management
- control_lane_mapping.rs, control_lane_policy.rs: Lane routing and policy
- dpor_exploration.rs: DPOR schedule exploration
- epoch_transition_barrier.rs, evidence_replay_gate.rs: Epoch and evidence gates
- key_role_separation.rs, root_pointer.rs, transition_abort.rs: Key management and transitions

New: atc/ module (air traffic control subsystem)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
